communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All superintendent contract documents including the contract itself, any addendums created as well as any other documents that have been created in relation to Superintendent Israel Vela's contract.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Donald Cook

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA US Navy ompf 5/5
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Roger Sick
Branch: United States Navy
DOB: 02/10/1937
Dates of Service: Approx 1957 to 1986
Passed away November 1992

Request following documents:
1) copy of Bronze Star Medal award citations
2) History of Assignments NAVPERS form 601-5
3) Navy commendation medal award citations
4) Presidential Unit citation award citation 
5) form 601-4 Navy occupation training 

Historical Documentation
Redact per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6)
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.

Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or please email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA US Army records Millett
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Lewis Millett
Branch: United States Army
DOB: Dec 15, 1920
Dates of Service: Approx 1940 to 1968

Please provide the following military service information:
1. copy of Distinguished Service Cross award Citation 
2. Section VII CURRENT AND PREVIOUS ASSIGNMENTS form
3.copy of Medal of Honor award citation 
 4. copy of Silver Star Medal award citation
5. copy of Bronze Star Medal award citation
6. Section II Military Education/ training courses
5. Purple heart awards

Redact per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.
Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley
